<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Страница-1" id="m4q5L0K9ErawMcEikG1M"> <mxGraphModel dx="783" dy="527" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" value="Самая успешная реализация MOF - Eclipse Modeling Framework (EMF)
для диаграммы классов" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="570" x="70.17000000000002" y="970" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;" value="User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="88.16000000000003" y="1130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Создать модель (XMI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="109.76" x="171.63000000000005" y="1070" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.021;entryY=0.68;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Импортировать модель (XMI → Ecore)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60.5" width="113" x="178.39000000000004" y="1140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" edge="1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="121.39000000000004" y="1170" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;size=28;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="<span style="font-size: 15px;">Импортёр на основе</span><div><span style="font-size: 15px;">XMI-файла&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 15px;">создает модель в формате .ecore (собственная метамодель EMF, которая является реализацией стандарта MOF)</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="119.5" width="210" x="368.1600000000001" y="1110.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" edge="1" parent="1" source="8" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="301.3900000000037" y="1121" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Сгенерировать код (Ecore → Java)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60.5" width="113" x="178.39000000000004" y="1220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endArrow=none;endFill=0;exitX=1;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="161.39000000000004" y="1170" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="218.39000000000004" y="1170" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 568px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:

для диаграммы классов
